name: Bitcoin
rationale: BTC is the best available long-only starter, but only at small size: the state feed shows positive short-term momentum (+0.18% 1W, +6.43% 1M) and price still above the 20-day average, while 3M momentum remains negative (-19.21%), so this is not a full trend allocation.
